error_signature: Update Contact node fails for Custom Fields
title: GHL Update Contact node fails for custom field updates
symptom: The GHL Update Contact node fails when attempting to update custom fields, while default fields update successfully.
not_this_if: Using a different node for updates
root_cause: The GHL Update Contact node has a known issue with the dropdown for custom fields, which can lead to failures when using display names instead of IDs. Additionally, certain field types like multiple choice or checkbox require specific formatting.
fix_steps: Change the custom field setting from 'From list' to 'By ID' or expression.
Paste the raw alphanumeric custom field ID from GHL settings.
If the field type is multiple choice or checkbox, wrap the expression in brackets [ ] to pass an array.
If issues persist, switch to a Custom HTTP Request node and send a PUT request directly to the GHL contacts endpoint.
agent_instruction: Use the Custom HTTP Request node to update custom fields if the GHL Update Contact node fails.
